message:
fix(inference): correct prior_override types and argument order

- Handle signature priors as direct field (not Option)
- Handle category as direct field (not Option)
- Fix compute_posterior argument order: (priors, evidence)
- Add proper test helper for SupervisorSignature construction
- Add prior_override module declaration and exports to mod.rs

Completes process_triage-vfz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
